# fly_apps (Data Source)

Lists Fly.io applications, optionally filtered by organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_apps" "all" {
  org_slug = "my-org"
}

output "app_names" {
  value = [for app in data.fly_apps.all.apps : app.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `org_slug` (String) Filter apps by organization slug.

### Read-Only

- `apps` (Attributes List) The list of applications. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--apps))

<a id="nestedatt--apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `apps`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) App ID.
- `name` (String) App name.
- `network` (String) Network name.
- `org_slug` (String) Organization slug.
- `status` (String) App status.
